teams.name: Accord Tamil Nadu Dragons
teams.tagline: Fear the Fire. Rule the Turf.
teams.summary: Accord Tamil Nadu Dragons is a professional field hockey franchise based in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. Competing in the Hockey India League, the team represents the sporting spirit of Tamil Nadu and brings together leading players from hockey programs across Indian states. The Dragons have quickly become one of the most exciting teams in the league through aggressive gameplay, passionate fan support, and strong performances on home and away turf.

events.title: HIL Match Day 8
events.opponent: Tamil Nadu Dragons vs Soorma HC

events.title: HIL Match Day 10
events.opponent: Tamil Nadu Dragons vs Kalinga Lancers

achievements.title: Top of HIL Points Table
achievements.description: Led the Hockey India League standings after strong back-to-back victories.

achievements.title: Victory against JSW Soorma HC (3-2)
achievements.description: A thrilling come-from-behind win that set the tone for the Dragons' season.

achievements.title: Reached HIL Top 4
achievements.description: Secured a playoff berth in the debut HIL season.

achievements.title: Hockey India League Debut
achievements.description: Entered the national stage competing against established franchises.

achievements.title: Team Founded
achievements.description: Accord Tamil Nadu Dragons established as a CTR Unified franchise.

teams.name: Chennai Super Warriors
teams.summary: Chennai Super Warriors is a professional pickleball franchise based in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, competing in the Premier Pickleball League India. The team blends top national talent with internationally trained athletes to deliver explosive, fast-paced pickleball. Their aggressive court strategy, relentless energy, and passionate home support make them one of the most entertaining and fearsome teams in the entire league.

achievements.title: PPL India Season Favorites
achievements.description: Entering the 2026 season as top contenders with a fully loaded squad.

achievements.title: PPL India Champions
achievements.description: Claimed the Premier Pickleball League India title with a thrilling final victory.

achievements.title: PPL India Semifinal Finish
achievements.description: Reached the last four in just their debut season, announcing themselves on the national stage.

achievements.title: PPL India Debut
achievements.description: Made a stunning debut season in the Premier Pickleball League India.

achievements.title: Team Founded
achievements.description: Chennai Super Warriors established as a CTR Unified franchise.

teams.name: Kashi Warriors
teams.tagline: The Spirit of Kashi. The Power of Warriors.
teams.summary: Kashi Warriors is a professional volleyball franchise representing the ancient city of Varanasi, competing in the Prime Volleyball League. The team embodies the timeless spirit of Kashi with a modern, athletic edge. With a blend of seasoned professionals and rising Indian talent, the Warriors have established themselves as a formidable force in the Indian volleyball landscape, known for their towering blocks and explosive attacks.

events.title: PVL Match Day 7
events.opponent: Kashi Warriors vs Hyderabad Black Hawks

achievements.title: PVL Season Contenders
achievements.description: Favored to challenge for the PVL title in the upcoming season.

achievements.title: PVL Semifinal Finish
achievements.description: Reached the final four in their third consecutive PVL campaign.

achievements.title: PVL Quarterfinal
achievements.description: Made the quarterfinals for the first time, defeating Bengaluru Torpedoes.

achievements.title: PVL Debut Season
achievements.description: A competitive debut in the Prime Volleyball League showcasing raw talent.

achievements.title: Team Founded
achievements.description: Kashi Warriors established as a CTR Unified franchise.

teams.name: Ossudu Accord Warriors
teams.tagline: Warriors from the Lakes. Champions of the Game.
teams.summary: Ossudu Accord Warriors is a professional cricket franchise competing in the Tamil Nadu Premier League. Drawing inspiration from the historic Ossudu Lake in Chennai, the team represents the rich cricketing heritage of Tamil Nadu. With a squad featuring seasoned TNPL veterans and exciting newcomers, the Warriors deliver thrilling performances across the shortest formats of the game, and their loyal fanbase makes every home game an unforgettable occasion.

events.title: TNPL Match Day 9
events.opponent: Ossudu Warriors vs Lyca Kovai Kings

achievements.title: TNPL Quarter Finals
achievements.description: Strong quarter-final performance with standout batting from Baba Aparajith.

achievements.title: Best New Team Award
achievements.description: Recognized for outstanding performance and fan engagement during the season.

achievements.title: TNPL Top 4 Finish
achievements.description: Secured a playoff berth with dominant performances in the group stage.

achievements.title: TNPL Semifinal
achievements.description: Reached the last four for the first time, narrowly losing to defending champions.

achievements.title: TNPL Debut
achievements.description: Ossudu Accord Warriors enter the Tamil Nadu Premier League as a founding franchise.

teams.name: Chennai Turbo Riders
teams.tagline: Push the Limit. Break the Record.
teams.summary: Chennai Turbo Riders is a professional Formula 4 racing team based in Chennai, competing in the MRF F4 Championship India. Representing the city's growing motorsport culture, the team combines cutting-edge engineering with young, hungry drivers who dream of reaching the pinnacle of motorsport. The Turbo Riders are known for their aggressive race strategy, relentless pursuit of speed, and a team culture that pushes every boundary on and off the track.

events.title: MRF F4 Round 4
events.opponent: Chennai Turbo Riders vs Vatsal Sheth Racing

achievements.title: Championship Season Favorites
achievements.description: Entering 2026 as one of the top championship contenders after a dominant 2025.

achievements.title: F4 Championship Contenders
achievements.description: Finished in the top 3 of the MRF F4 standings with multiple podiums.

achievements.title: First Podium Finish
achievements.description: Arjun Balu claimed the team's inaugural podium at the Madras Motor Race Track.

achievements.title: MRF F4 Debut
achievements.description: Competed in their first MRF F4 Championship season with a strong rookie showing.

achievements.title: Team Founded
achievements.description: Chennai Turbo Riders established as a CTR Unified motorsport franchise.

teams.name: CTR Velocity Racing
teams.sport: CTR Indian National Car Racing Championship
teams.tagline: Built for speed. Engineered for the championship.
teams.league: CTR Indian National Car Racing Championship
teams.summary: CTR Velocity Racing is a fictional national-level racing team created for the CTR Indian National Car Racing Championship. The team blends junior driver development, race engineering, and disciplined operations to simulate a modern circuit racing program. It serves as a temporary placeholder franchise for the new motorsport championship content and is styled to match the academy-led progression model used across CTR Unified.

events.title: CTR Nationals Round 1
events.opponent: CTR Velocity Racing vs Apex Motorsport

achievements.title: Championship Entry
achievements.description: Entered the inaugural CTR Indian National Car Racing Championship as a development-focused team.

achievements.title: Junior Driver Pipeline
achievements.description: Built a training-first lineup centered on karting graduates moving into circuit racing.

achievements.title: Operations Launch
achievements.description: Completed the first shakedown and operational test program for the fictional team.
